cards.contentEn:
• Architecture: Virtual DOM, reusable components, and Suspense for data loading.
  • React Server Components (RSC): Render UI on the server (Next.js) for zero JS bundle size and direct database access.
  • Optimization: Code splitting, Lazy Loading, and massive use of Tailwind CSS and Shadcn/UI for styling.
cards.contentPt:
• Arquitetura: Virtual DOM, componentes reutilizáveis, e Suspense para carregamento.
  • React Server Components (RSC): Renderiza UI no servidor (Next.js) reduzindo bundle de JS e permitindo acesso direto a banco.
  • Otimização: Code splitting, Lazy Loading, e adoção massiva de Tailwind CSS e Shadcn/UI.

cards.contentEn:
• Robustness: Built-in Dependency Injection, strict TypeScript, and RxJS streams.
  • Enterprise Scale: Feature-based modules, Lazy Loading, and Route Guards for auth.
  • Signals: Replacing Zone.js for granular reactivity, massively improving performance.
  • OnPush: Change detection strategy that skips unnecessary tree checks.
cards.contentPt:
• Robustez: Injeção de dependência nativa, TypeScript estrito e RxJS.
  • Escala Enterprise: Módulos por feature, Lazy Loading e Route Guards para auth.
  • Signals: Substituindo Zone.js para reatividade granular e alta performance.
  • OnPush: Estratégia de change detection que evita verificações de árvore desnecessárias.

cards.contentEn:
• Philosophy: Progressive framework. Easy to integrate into existing apps.
  • Frameworks: Nuxt for SSR/SSG and Quasar for cross-platform enterprise UIs.
cards.contentPt:
• Filosofia: Framework progressivo. Fácil adoção em projetos existentes.
  • Frameworks: Nuxt para SSR/SSG e Quasar para UI corporativas multiplataforma.

cards.contentEn:
• Web Vitals: LCP (Largest Contentful Paint), FID (First Input Delay), CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift).
  • Code Splitting: Bundle splitting by routes or lazy components to reduce initial payload.
  • Tree Shaking: Removing unused code at build time.
  • Memoization: React.memo, useMemo, useCallback to prevent unnecessary re-renders.
  • Asset Optimization: Image compression, WebP format, CDN distribution.
  • Service Workers: Offline support and advanced caching strategies.
cards.contentPt:
• Web Vitals: LCP, FID, CLS - métricas de performance do Google.
  • Code Splitting: Bundle por rotas ou componentes lazy para reduzir carga inicial.
  • Tree Shaking: Remove código não utilizado em build time.
  • Memoization: React.memo, useMemo, useCallback para evitar re-renders desnecessários.
  • Asset Optimization: Compressão de imagens, WebP, CDN global.
  • Service Workers: Suporte offline e estratégias de cache avançadas.

cards.contentEn:
• REST (Representational State Transfer): Resource-oriented. Standard HTTP methods. Broad compatibility.
  • gRPC (Google Remote Procedure Call): Uses HTTP/2 and Protobuf. Binary serialization. Extremely fast for microservice communication.
  • GraphQL: Query language. Client specifies exactly what data it needs. Solves over/underfetching. Ideal for BFFs (Backend For Frontend).
  • Webhook: Server-initiated HTTP callbacks. Event-driven integrations.
cards.contentPt:
• REST: Orientado a recursos. HTTP methods. Ampla compatibilidade.
  • gRPC: HTTP/2 e Protobuf. Serialização binária. Extremamente rápido.
  • GraphQL: Cliente especifica exatamente o que precisa. Ideal para BFFs.
  • Webhook: Callbacks HTTP iniciados pelo servidor. Integrações orientadas a eventos.

cards.contentEn:
• Client-Side Rendering (CSR): Full control, slow initial page load, good for interactive dashboards.
  • Server-Side Rendering (SSR): Fast initial load, SEO friendly. Requires rendering server (Next.js, Nuxt).
  • Static Site Generation (SSG): Pre-build pages at deploy time. Ultra-fast. Ideal for blogs and content sites.
  • Incremental Static Regeneration (ISR): Hybrid. Rebuild pages on-demand while serving stale content.
  • State Management: Redux, Zustand, Pinia, Recoil. Choose based on complexity (simple apps vs enterprise).
cards.contentPt:
• CSR: Controle total, carregamento inicial lento, bom para dashboards.
  • SSR: Carregamento rápido, SEO friendly (Next.js, Nuxt).
  • SSG: Pré-build em deploy time. Ultra-rápido. Ideal para blogs.
  • ISR: Híbrido. Reconstruir sob demanda mantendo conteúdo stale.
  • State Management: Redux, Zustand, Pinia, Recoil. Escolha conforme complexidade.
